steps.title: Read around the claim
steps.content: The underlined portion gives MoMA's stated reason for showing some games only as video presentations: those games would be impractical to display in playable form. The word "but" then introduces the author's criticism of that reason.

steps.title: Classify its function
steps.content: A reverses the relationship by saying the author defends against a criticism. C and D treat the underlined portion as a claim about video games themselves. Its function is to present MoMA's rationale for a decision that the author goes on to critique. The answer is B.
